full_text:
Shi Bao (Zhongrong) 石苞 (仲容)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Bao (石苞), styledZhongrong (仲容), was born in Nanpi in Bohai. Sold weapons to make a living, became a leading general of Jin and a popular offical. Shi Bao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Shi Bao lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
